free_text: Neutron capture cross sections at 25 keV
No information
Sb-Be photoneutron source (16 Ci)
Moderated neutrons for thermal standards from
Ra-Be source (500 mCi).
Activation followed by gamma-counting.
Double comparison method= Both the iodine standard
and the material to be measured were activated by
25 keV and by thermal neutrons. Taking the thermal
cross sections from literature, the branching ratios
of the decay gammas measured need not be known.
Errors given include experimental errors
(mainly counting statistics). Compound error of the 3
standard cross sections used.
Overall error = root mean square projection of all
errors stated above.

This subentry supersedes EXFOR 30247.002 which contains
the result of an earlier experiment reported at the
Madurai conference 1970.
Because of the complex gamma spectrum, the saturation
activity and its half-life was measured instead of
the photopeak of a particular gamma line.
